ops.body: Round-5 re-baseline at v0.1.3 complete (isolated harness: sed __SID__ fresh UUID per run | uvx capt-hook --root /tmp/show-rubric-panel --hooks <working-copy>/plugins/show/hooks run PostToolUse; 30/30 clean runs, zero backend errors). Rates: nb04 1/10 (meets the ≤1/10 gate — accepting as tail noise, rubric optimistic; will re-measure for regression), nb05 2/10, nb06 2/10 (both over gate). All five flaky fire reasons cite the option-list shape and ignore the case's carve-out (nb05 fires never mention the user's plain-text request; nb06 fires never mention triviality) — prompt-side, as filed. Iteration 1 of ≤2: add two contrastive fire=false examples (plain-text-requested; two-trivial-one-line-options), nb04 untouched.
